data.body: Add a canonical `normalizeOpenCodeModel` extractor to `src/lib/agent-identity.ts` so OpenCode is no longer a passthrough in `normalizeAgentIdentity`. This is the root cause of the "OpenCode openrouter/moonshotai/kimi-k2.6 4.7" leak in the beat table — the OpenCode binary version is bleeding into the model-version slot because there is no dedicated parser. See parent knot foolery-2e97 for full contract.
data.title: Add canonical OpenCode model extractor (no more 4.7 leak)
